Metadata.defaultTitle: Dubai Rent Cars | Luxury Car & SUV Rental Dubai
Metadata.defaultDescription: Rent the best luxury cars and SUVs in Dubai. Wide fleet of Lamborghini, Ferrari, Rolls Royce and more. 24/7 VIP Service.

Rental.visitInstruction: Please visit Dubai Rent Cars agency within 48 hours to confirm your rental with this official request document.
Rental.depositRemark: Deposit will be unblocked after the finish of the rent. The deposit is not included in the price.
Rental.cancellationRemark: Cancellation possible with fees depending on conditions.
Rental.cancel30: 30 days before of rental start - 30% penalty of total amount
Rental.cancel14: 14 days before of rental start - 40% penalty of total amount
Rental.cancel7: 7 days before of rental start - 60% penalty of total amount
Rental.cancel3: 3 days before of rental start - 100% penalty of total amount

Dashboard.welcome: Welcome to the Dubai Rent Cars, Pilot. Your telemetry data is now synchronized.
Dashboard.rankExplanation: Rank Up by completing paid rentals. BRONZE (0-5), SILVER (6-15), GOLD (16-25), ELITE (26+).

Footer.description: Rent your car in Dubai easily and enjoy every journey with complete freedom. Reliable service, varied fleet and 24/7 assistance.

Index.heroSubtitle: Rent your car in Dubai easily and enjoy every journey with complete freedom. Reliable service, varied fleet and 24/7 assistance.

About.mainDesc: Dubai Rent Cars was built for the 1%. Not just in wealth, but in ambition. We provide the machines that match your velocity.
About.visionDesc: Redefining luxury car rental by offering an exclusive, elegant, and unparalleled experience on an international scale.
About.recordDesc: A prestigious fleet of high-end vehicles, rigorously maintained to guarantee performance, comfort, and absolute reliability.
About.societyDesc: An elite clientele that demands the best and lives the experience of automotive luxury without compromise.
About.serviceMessage: Rent your car in Dubai easily and enjoy every journey with complete freedom. Reliable service, varied fleet and 24/7 assistance.

BrandManager.decommissionConfirm: Are you certain you want to decommission this brand node?

AdminWelcome.title: Administrator Space
AdminWelcome.subtitle: Welcome to your management interface. This page summarizes all the tools available in your sidebar navigation to optimally drive your RentCar platform.
AdminWelcome.sectionStatsDetails: Monitor recent bookings, revenue, and analyze agency growth. Visualize confirmed or pending payments at a glance.
AdminWelcome.sectionFleetDetails: Add, edit, or remove vehicles from the platform. Manage statuses (active, maintenance) to control what is visible or bookable by clients on the site.
AdminWelcome.sectionLocationsDetails: Define pickup and drop-off addresses. These locations will automatically appear in the booking dropdowns for clients.
AdminWelcome.sectionPromosDetails: Create discount codes (e.g. SUMMER-2026), define the discount percentage and the target (All, Silver, Elite). These codes are automatically calculated in the cart.
AdminWelcome.sectionUsersDetails: Consult registered profiles. Manage roles, analyze client status, or promote team members to administrative rights.
AdminWelcome.sectionContactDetails: Read and manage messages sent from the site's contact form. The interface centralizes all customer service requests.
AdminWelcome.sectionFooterDetails: Modify the appearance, contact information, and social media links displayed at the bottom of the public site with a single click.

AgentWelcome.title: Agent Space
AgentWelcome.subtitle: Welcome to your operational management interface. This panel groups all the tools you need to process bookings and manage the vehicle fleet on a daily basis.
AgentWelcome.sectionBookingsDetails: Check new booking requests in the Statistics tab. You can change their status (Approved, Refused, Completed) and verify payments.
AgentWelcome.sectionFleetDetails: Ensure vehicles are marked with the correct status. Change them to 'Maintenance' or 'Inactive' if they are not roadworthy.
AgentWelcome.sectionLocationsDetails: Check the planned pickup and drop-off points for each client to organize key handovers (e.g. Airport Hub vs City Center Agency).
AgentWelcome.sectionContactDetails: Process incoming messages from the public contact form. Respond quickly to client questions to improve conversion.
AgentWelcome.sectionUsersDetails: Ban non-compliant users or permanently delete the accounts of problematic clients.
AgentWelcome.sectionFooterDetails: Manage public footer information such as the address, official email, or the platform's phone numbers.

Stats.title: Statis
Stats.subtitle: Centralized management of all client rental requests.
